vision: Enterprise data integration platform for creating synchronization workflows between business applications

target_audience.primary: Enterprise Integration Developers - technical professionals who build and maintain data synchronization workflows between business applications like CRMs, ERPs, and financial systems
secondary: Business Systems Administrators who manage integrations between enterprise applications
IT consultants implementing integration solutions for clients

phases.name: Foundation / Critical Fixes
phases.description: Address critical bugs, fix authentication system, establish security hardening, and enable reliable development workflows. Also establish competitive pricing model.

milestones.title: Authentication System Restored
milestones.description: Users can successfully log in with custom accounts; demo workflows function correctly

milestones.title: Security Hardened
milestones.description: All credentials secured, no hardcoded passwords, audit logging enabled

milestones.title: Cross-Platform Development Ready
milestones.description: Developers can run InterWeave IDE on Linux and macOS in addition to Windows

milestones.title: Documentation Consolidated
milestones.description: All documentation unified into a searchable developer portal with quick-start guides

milestones.title: Competitive Pricing Published
milestones.description: Transparent pricing model published with comparison calculator

phases.name: Monitoring and Debugging
phases.description: Build comprehensive monitoring and debugging capabilities to address key competitor weaknesses and improve production visibility

milestones.title: Integration Monitoring Live
milestones.description: Real-time dashboard showing integration status, errors, and transaction history is operational

milestones.title: Enhanced Debugging Available
milestones.description: Developers can step through transformations, inspect data at each stage, and identify issues quickly

phases.name: Developer Experience Enhancement
phases.description: Improve the development experience with REST API, enhanced connectors, templates, version control, and multi-user collaboration support

milestones.title: REST API Available
milestones.description: External systems can trigger and manage integration flows via documented REST API

milestones.title: Enhanced Connectors Launched
milestones.description: Production-grade Salesforce and QuickBooks connectors with OAuth wizards and bulk operations

milestones.title: Template Library Launched
milestones.description: Pre-built integration templates for common Salesforce/QuickBooks/Creatio scenarios available

milestones.title: Multi-User Development with Version Control
milestones.description: Teams can work concurrently with proper access controls and project versioning

phases.name: Platform Modernization & Scale
phases.description: Modernize the underlying platform, support newer Java versions, add automated testing, and provide migration tools for PowerCenter refugees

milestones.title: Java 11+ Support
milestones.description: Platform supports modern Java LTS versions (11, 17, 21) with improved performance

milestones.title: Performance Optimized
milestones.description: IDE startup time and transformation processing significantly improved

milestones.title: Automated Testing Framework
milestones.description: Integration flows can be tested automatically with mock data and CI/CD integration

milestones.title: PowerCenter Migration Path Available
milestones.description: Tools and guides to help Informatica PowerCenter customers migrate to InterWeave

phases.name: Future / Vision
phases.description: Long-term strategic features including AI assistance and hybrid cloud options for market expansion

milestones.title: AI-Assisted Integration Building
milestones.description: Developers can use AI to generate transformation templates and troubleshoot integration issues

milestones.title: Hybrid Cloud Option Available
milestones.description: Organizations can choose between pure on-premise and hybrid cloud deployment models

features.title: Fix User Authentication System
features.description: Resolve the LoginServlet authentication issue where custom user accounts fail to authenticate. Align the password hash implementation with the database schema to enable proper user login functionality.
features.rationale: Critical blocker preventing users from accessing the platform with custom accounts. Without working authentication, new users cannot evaluate or use the product. This is fundamental to any enterprise deployment.
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in with email and password credentials stored in the database
Password hashing algorithm matches the stored hash format in the database
Failed login attempts display appropriate error messages
Session management works correctly after successful authentication
Existing admin/root accounts continue to work
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want to log in with my company-assigned credentials so that I can access my integration projects
As a system administrator, I want to create new user accounts so that team members can access the platform

features.title: Cross-Platform Support (Linux/macOS)
features.description: Enhance platform support to run reliably on Linux and macOS systems. Convert Windows-centric batch scripts to cross-platform alternatives and ensure all components work on non-Windows environments.
features.rationale: Many enterprise developers use macOS or Linux workstations. Limiting to Windows-only reduces adoption potential. Addresses competitor pain point where Informatica has complex installation requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Shell scripts (.sh) provided for all operations currently using batch files (.bat)
IDE launches and functions correctly on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and macOS Sonoma
Bundled JRE works on Linux and macOS
Tomcat web portal deploys and runs on all platforms
File paths use platform-independent separators
user_stories: As a developer using macOS, I want to run InterWeave IDE natively so that I don't need a Windows VM
As a DevOps engineer deploying on Linux servers, I want deployment scripts that work natively

features.title: Unified Documentation Portal
features.description: Consolidate all documentation into a searchable, well-organized developer portal. Include quick-start guides, API references, video tutorials, and troubleshooting guides.
features.rationale: Documentation is scattered and needs improvement. Competitors like MuleSoft and Boomi are criticized for steep learning curves - comprehensive documentation can be a key differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: All existing documentation migrated to a single searchable portal
Quick-start guide enables new users to create first integration within 30 minutes
API reference documentation for all adapters (SOAP, REST, SQL, etc.)
Video walkthroughs for common Salesforce, QuickBooks, and Creatio integrations
Troubleshooting section with common issues and solutions
user_stories: As a new developer, I want a quick-start guide so that I can create my first integration quickly
As an experienced developer, I want searchable API documentation so that I can find specific adapter configurations fast

features.title: Improved Error Messages and Validation
features.description: Enhance error handling throughout the platform to provide clear, actionable error messages. Include validation at design-time to catch issues before deployment.
features.rationale: Competitors like Boomi and Zapier are criticized for poor error visibility. Clear error messages reduce troubleshooting time. This is a quick win that addresses multiple competitor weaknesses.
acceptance_criteria: All error messages include specific cause, affected component, and suggested resolution
Flow validation catches missing connections, invalid XPath expressions, and configuration errors
Error logs include timestamps, transaction IDs, and full stack traces for debugging
Common errors have linked documentation explaining resolution steps
user_stories: As a developer debugging a failed integration, I want clear error messages so that I can quickly identify the root cause
As a developer designing a flow, I want real-time validation so that I catch configuration errors before deployment

features.title: Real-Time Integration Monitoring Dashboard
features.description: Build a comprehensive web-based dashboard showing real-time integration status, transaction history, success/failure rates, and performance metrics. Enable alerting for integration failures.
features.rationale: Monitoring is the #1 complaint about Dell Boomi. This is a major market gap across competitors (MuleSoft, Boomi, Power Automate, Zapier). A strong monitoring story would be a significant differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays real-time status of all transaction flows (running, completed, failed)
Transaction history with search and filter capabilities
Success/failure rate metrics and trends over time
Drill-down capability to view individual transaction details and data payloads
Email/webhook alerting for integration failures
Performance metrics showing execution time and throughput
user_stories: As an operations manager, I want a dashboard view of all integrations so that I can monitor system health at a glance
As a support engineer, I want to search transaction history so that I can investigate customer-reported data issues
As a developer, I want alerts when my integration fails so that I can respond quickly

features.title: Visual Transformation Debugger
features.description: Create an interactive debugger for XSLT transformations that allows step-by-step execution, variable inspection, and data preview at each transformation stage.
features.rationale: MuleSoft's Anypoint Studio has bugs with large XMLs and debugging is clunky. Boomi's debugging is complex with insufficient logs. A superior debugging experience would showcase our XSLT strength.
acceptance_criteria: Step-through execution of XSLT transformations with current position highlighting
View input XML, output XML, and intermediate states at each step
Set breakpoints on specific template matches or XPath expressions
Watch expressions to monitor variable values during execution
Compare expected vs actual output with diff highlighting
Export debug session for sharing with team members
user_stories: As a developer troubleshooting a data transformation issue, I want to step through my XSLT so that I can identify where data is incorrectly transformed
As a developer building complex transformations, I want to set breakpoints so that I can verify intermediate results

features.title: Transaction Flow Logging and Replay
features.description: Implement comprehensive logging of transaction flow executions with the ability to replay failed transactions. Store input/output payloads for each step.
features.rationale: Visibility between connections is limited in Boomi. Zapier users report failures go undetected until business impact. Complete transaction tracing enables fast recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Full payload logging for each step in a transaction flow (configurable retention)
Ability to replay a failed transaction with same input data
Side-by-side comparison of successful vs failed transaction executions
Automatic retry configuration for transient failures
Data masking for sensitive fields in logs (PII, credentials)
user_stories: As a support engineer, I want to see the exact data that flowed through each step so that I can identify where processing went wrong
As an operations manager, I want to replay failed transactions so that I can recover from temporary outages

features.title: Pre-Built Integration Template Library
features.description: Create a library of pre-built, ready-to-use integration templates for common business scenarios: Salesforce-to-QuickBooks sync, Creatio-to-payment processor flows, CRM-to-ERP data synchronization.
features.rationale: InterWeave already has sample projects but these need to be productized. This addresses the steep learning curve pain point and provides immediate value. Pre-built connectors are a market gap.
acceptance_criteria: At least 10 pre-built templates covering Salesforce, QuickBooks, Creatio, and payment processor integrations
One-click import of templates into new projects
Templates are customizable after import
Each template includes documentation explaining the integration pattern
Template version management for updates
user_stories: As a developer new to InterWeave, I want pre-built templates so that I can start with a working integration
As an IT consultant, I want ready-to-use Salesforce-QuickBooks templates so that I can quickly deliver value to clients

features.title: Multi-User Concurrent Development
features.description: Enable multiple developers to work on integration projects simultaneously with proper access controls and conflict resolution.
features.rationale: Current single-user test server access is a major limitation. Enterprise teams need concurrent development capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: Multiple developers can connect to test server simultaneously
Project-level and flow-level access controls (read, write, admin)
Locking mechanism to prevent conflicting edits to the same flow
Conflict resolution UI when overlapping changes are detected
Audit log of who changed what and when
user_stories: As a team lead, I want multiple developers to work on integrations simultaneously so that we can deliver projects faster
As a developer, I want to know if someone else is editing a flow so that I don't lose my changes

features.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
features.description: Implement comprehensive role-based access control for the web portal and IDE with granular permissions for projects, connections, and deployments.
features.rationale: Enterprise customers need proper access controls for compliance and security. This differentiates from simpler tools like Zapier.
acceptance_criteria: Predefined roles: Admin, Developer, Operator, Viewer
Custom role creation with granular permission assignment
Permissions for: project access, connection management, deployment, user management
Role assignment at organization and project levels
SSO/LDAP integration for enterprise authentication
user_stories: As a system administrator, I want to assign roles to users so that they only access resources they need
As a compliance officer, I want to restrict production deployment to senior developers

features.title: Connection Credential Vault
features.description: Implement a secure credential vault for storing API keys, passwords, and OAuth tokens. Support credential rotation and centralized management.
features.rationale: Managing connections and credentials across multiple systems is a core pain point. A centralized vault simplifies credential management and improves security.
acceptance_criteria: Encrypted storage for all credential types (API keys, passwords, certificates, OAuth tokens)
Centralized credential management accessible across projects
Credential rotation with automatic update to all using connections
Audit log of credential access and changes
Integration with external secret managers (HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager)
user_stories: As a security administrator, I want centralized credential storage so that I can rotate API keys without updating each integration
As an auditor, I want to see who accessed production credentials so that I can verify compliance

features.title: Modern Java Version Support (11/17/21)
features.description: Update the platform to support modern Java LTS versions (11, 17, 21) while maintaining backward compatibility with Java 8.
features.rationale: Java 8 is reaching end of support. Modern Java versions offer significant performance improvements and security updates. This addresses technical debt.
acceptance_criteria: Platform compiles and runs on Java 11, 17, and 21
All adapters (SOAP, REST, SQL) work with modern Java versions
Bundled JRE updated to Java 17 LTS
Performance benchmarks show improvement on modern Java
Migration guide for existing deployments
user_stories: As an enterprise architect, I want to run on supported Java versions so that we receive security updates
As a DevOps engineer, I want modern Java so that I can use containerized deployments

features.title: IDE Performance Optimization
features.description: Optimize IDE startup time, memory usage, and responsiveness when working with large projects.
features.rationale: Informatica PowerCenter is criticized for being heavy software. InterWeave's self-contained deployment should be lightweight. Performance is a differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: IDE startup time reduced by 50%
Memory footprint reduced by 30% for typical projects
Smooth performance with projects containing 100+ flows
Lazy loading of project components to improve responsiveness
Resource usage monitoring and recommendations
user_stories: As a developer, I want the IDE to start quickly so that I can be productive immediately
As a developer with a modest laptop, I want low memory usage so that I can run other tools alongside the IDE

features.title: Transformation Engine Performance
features.description: Optimize the XSLT transformation engine for better throughput when processing large XML documents and high transaction volumes.
features.rationale: MuleSoft's TransformMessage has bugs with large XMLs. Optimized transformation performance would directly counter this weakness and strengthen our XSLT differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: 50% improvement in transformation throughput for large documents (>1MB XML)
Compiled XSLT caching to avoid repeated parsing
Parallel processing for batch transformations
Memory-efficient streaming for very large files
Performance metrics dashboard for transformation timing
user_stories: As a developer handling high-volume integrations, I want fast transformation processing so that scheduled syncs complete within time windows
As an architect, I want reliable performance with large documents so that I can handle enterprise data volumes

features.title: AI-Assisted Integration Building
features.description: Integrate AI capabilities to assist with integration development: auto-generate data mappings, suggest transformation patterns, and provide natural language troubleshooting.
features.rationale: AI integration is becoming an expected feature. This would modernize InterWeave and address steep learning curve complaints. AI can reduce skill barriers.
acceptance_criteria: AI can suggest data mappings given source and target schemas
Natural language interface for asking how to accomplish integration tasks
AI-powered troubleshooting suggestions for common errors
Auto-generation of XSLT templates from mapping specifications
Privacy controls - no customer data sent to external AI services without consent
user_stories: As a junior developer, I want AI to suggest mappings so that I can create integrations without deep XSLT expertise
As a developer troubleshooting, I want to describe problems in natural language and get solution suggestions

features.title: Hybrid Cloud Deployment Option
features.description: Provide a hybrid deployment model where the IDE and runtime can optionally connect to cloud services for monitoring, backup, and collaboration while keeping data processing on-premise.
features.rationale: Informatica is forcing customers to cloud migration against their will. InterWeave can capitalize by offering choice: pure on-premise for data-sensitive customers, hybrid for convenience.
acceptance_criteria: Pure on-premise remains fully functional with no cloud dependency
Optional cloud connection for centralized monitoring across deployments
Cloud-based project backup and version control
Clear data residency controls - only metadata to cloud, never customer data
Easy toggle between on-premise and hybrid modes
user_stories: As an IT director at a data-sensitive company, I want pure on-premise deployment so that no data leaves our network
As an IT manager with multiple sites, I want optional cloud monitoring so that I can view all deployments from one dashboard

features.title: REST API for Programmatic Access
features.description: Implement a modern REST API for managing integrations programmatically. Support CRUD operations on flows, trigger execution, retrieve logs, and manage configurations. Include OpenAPI/Swagger documentation.
features.rationale: No modern REST API is explicitly identified as a known gap. Required for CI/CD integration, automation, and third-party tool integration. Informatica users complain about manual integration with DevOps - this would be a key differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: RESTful endpoints for all major operations (flows, connections, executions)
OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication options
OpenAPI/Swagger documentation auto-generated
Rate limiting and usage monitoring
Webhook support for event notifications
SDK libraries for Java, Python, and JavaScript
user_stories: As a DevOps engineer, I want REST API access so that I can automate deployments via CI/CD pipelines
As a developer, I want to trigger flows programmatically so that I can integrate with external scheduling systems
As an architect, I want API documentation so that I can build custom integrations with our internal tools

features.title: Predictable Pricing Model
features.description: Implement transparent, predictable pricing without per-connector or per-transaction fees. Provide a public pricing calculator and comparison tool showing TCO savings versus competitors.
features.rationale: Pricing is the #1 complaint across MuleSoft (inaccessible for smaller companies), Boomi ($320/mo per connector), Workato (135+ G2 mentions), and Zapier (10K orders consume monthly limit). Transparent pricing would be a massive differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: Clear pricing tiers published on website with no hidden fees
No per-connector licensing fees
No per-transaction fees that scale unpredictably
Interactive pricing calculator for different usage scenarios
TCO comparison tool vs MuleSoft, Boomi, Workato, and Zapier
Annual and monthly payment options with clear terms
user_stories: As a budget owner, I want predictable pricing so that I can plan costs without surprises
As an evaluator, I want to compare costs easily so that I can justify the decision to leadership
As a growing business, I want pricing that scales reasonably so that success doesn't mean exploding costs

features.title: Informatica PowerCenter Migration Toolkit
features.description: Build tools to help Informatica PowerCenter users migrate their integrations to InterWeave. Include workflow analyzer, mapping conversion utilities, and comprehensive migration guide.
features.rationale: Informatica is discontinuing on-premise support after 2026, forcing customers to expensive cloud migration. PowerCenter market share dropped from 11% to 6%. This creates a huge opportunity to capture migrating customers who want to stay self-hosted.
acceptance_criteria: Analyzer tool assesses PowerCenter workflows and estimates migration effort
Mapping conversion for common transformation types (Expression, Filter, Joiner, etc.)
Step-by-step migration guide with best practices
Template mappings showing equivalent InterWeave patterns for each PowerCenter component
Professional services referral program for complex migrations
Case studies from successful PowerCenter migrations
user_stories: As a PowerCenter user facing forced cloud migration, I want to assess my migration options so that I can choose the best path
As an integration developer, I want conversion tools so that I don't have to completely rewrite existing integrations
As an IT director, I want to stay on-premise so that we meet data privacy and compliance requirements

features.title: Enhanced Salesforce Connector
features.description: Build a robust, production-grade Salesforce connector with OAuth wizard, visual object browser, bulk API support, and change data capture for real-time sync.
features.rationale: Power Automate is described as only working well in Microsoft environment. Native Salesforce connector fills a critical market gap. Strong non-Microsoft app support is a differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: OAuth 2.0 authentication wizard with guided setup
Visual object browser showing all standard and custom objects
Field-level mapping with type compatibility validation
Bulk API support for large data volumes (millions of records)
Change Data Capture integration for real-time triggers
Pre-built templates for common Salesforce integration patterns
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want easy Salesforce connection so that I don't spend hours on authentication setup
As a developer, I want to browse Salesforce objects visually so that I can map fields without Salesforce expertise
As a business, I want reliable Salesforce sync so that CRM and financial data stays consistent

features.title: Enhanced QuickBooks Connector
features.description: Build a robust QuickBooks connector supporting both Online and Desktop versions. Include invoice, customer, payment, and inventory sync templates with proper error handling.
features.rationale: QuickBooks integration is one of our existing sample projects (Creatio_QuickBooks_Integration). Enhancing this connector addresses the market gap for native QuickBooks integration without expensive third-party middleware.
acceptance_criteria: Support for both QuickBooks Online and Desktop versions
OAuth setup wizard for QuickBooks Online
Pre-built templates for invoice, customer, payment, and inventory sync
Batch operations for high-volume synchronization
Comprehensive error handling for QuickBooks-specific issues
Bi-directional sync support
user_stories: As a business owner, I want to sync CRM to QuickBooks so that invoicing is automated without manual data entry
As an integration developer, I want pre-built QuickBooks templates so that I can deliver faster
As an accountant, I want reliable inventory sync so that financial data is always accurate

features.title: Integration Flow Version Control
features.description: Add built-in version control for integration projects. Track changes, support branching, enable rollback, and provide visual diff for comparing flow versions.
features.rationale: No version control for integration projects is identified as a known gap. As integrations become business-critical, teams need to track changes, collaborate, and safely rollback when issues occur.
acceptance_criteria: Every save creates a version with timestamp, author, and description
Visual version history with diff highlighting
One-click rollback to any previous version
Branch support for parallel development and testing
Merge capability with conflict resolution UI
Export/import versioned projects
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want to version my projects so that I can track changes and who made them
As a team lead, I want to review changes before deployment so that we catch issues early
As a developer, I want to rollback bad changes quickly so that production issues can be resolved fast

features.title: Automated Integration Testing Framework
features.description: Implement automated testing capabilities for integration flows. Support mock data sources, assertions, test suites, and CI/CD integration.
features.rationale: Missing automated testing framework is explicitly identified as a known gap. Testing is critical for enterprise deployments. Manual testing slows development and increases risk of production issues.
acceptance_criteria: Mock data sources for testing without live API connections
Assertion framework for validating transformation outputs
Test suite management with grouping and tagging
Test execution reports with pass/fail status and details
CI/CD integration via REST API for automated test runs
Code coverage metrics for transformation rules
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want to test flows with mock data so that I can develop safely without impacting production systems
As a DevOps engineer, I want automated tests in CI/CD so that deployments are validated before release
As a team lead, I want test coverage reports so that I can ensure quality before production deployment

features.title: Secure Credential Management
features.description: Remove hardcoded credentials and implement secure credential storage. Use encrypted configuration, environment variables, and credential rotation without downtime.
features.rationale: Current system has hardcoded admin credentials and exposed database credentials in .env file. This is a critical security vulnerability identified in technical debt. Enterprise customers require proper security hygiene.
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded credentials anywhere in source code or configuration
All credentials encrypted at rest using industry-standard encryption
Admin password must be changed after initial setup (forced change)
Credential rotation supported without service downtime
Audit log for all credential access and modifications
Integration with external secret managers optional (HashiCorp Vault, etc.)
user_stories: As an IT administrator, I want credentials securely stored so that we pass security audits
As a security officer, I want credential access logged so that we can detect unauthorized access
As an operations manager, I want to rotate credentials without downtime so that security maintenance doesn't impact business
